lastFailureSignature: crawl|help-crawl-platform-blocked|AppMap for .NET is currently only supported on linux-x64. Platform win-x64 not supported yet. Please go to https://github.com/applandinc/appmap-dotnet to tell us about platform support you're interested in.
lastFailureMessage:
AppMap for .NET is currently only supported on linux-x64.
Platform win-x64 not supported yet.
Please go to https://github.com/applandinc/appmap-dotnet to tell us about platform support you're interested in.
